scope: Physical Quantum Qi v0.2 deepening public implementation chain closure including SK/FV Qi action v0.2A, Ward/leak identity v0.2B, DPI recoverability v0.2C, IndraNet gauge transport v0.2D, Qi OS handoff, Qi OS bridge packet, and Qi MemoryOS record candidate
closed_invariants: FullPathQi requires SK/FV history evidence
FullPathQi requires SK/FV Qi action v0.2A conditions
S_sys must declare covariant derivative and concrete potential decomposition
S_IF kernels must declare causality, noise positivity, spectral consistency, and SK normalization
FDR status must be declared for thermal or nonequilibrium environments
Markov reduction cannot certify FullPathQi without reduction receipt
PhysicalQi requires Ward/leak accounting
PhysicalQi requires Ward/leak identity v0.2B physicalization
J_Qi must be defined as variation of S_eff with respect to A_mu
Open Ward/leak identity requires L_leak, A_anom, R_res, and W_leak residual accounting
Leak term is physical boundary/environment/membrane/coarse-graining/measurement exchange, not an audit label
DPI recoverability requires theoremized Delta_DPI, R_Qi, eta_Qi, and delta_rec
Delta_DPI must be nonnegative unless explicitly marked as numerical diagnostic error
R_Qi must equal exp(-Delta_DPI) and satisfy 0 < R_Qi <= 1
eta_Qi must include Delta_DPI, entropy production, lock-in, memory, and observation burden
delta_rec gates repair/rollback evaluation but grants no execution authority
IndraNet gauge transport requires A_mu, F_munu, U_gamma, and W(C)
IndraNet transport is gauge geometry, not graph-only relation
Scope drift and holonomy residue must be declared and visible
Transport residue must remain component-visible and cannot be hidden by scalar summary
Recovery claims require positive delta_rec
IndraNet Qi transport requires gauge connection and holonomy accounting
Qi emerges from delta_rel through string/brane/gauge/current structure and never directly from K
MGAP4D 33/20 remains a stable floor, not a Qi source
Qi phase classification is a routing surface, not an authority grant
FullPathQi is MemoryOS-recordable and ReflectionOS-analyzable but not executable
Qi_OS_bridge_packet exposes candidate-only OS payloads
Qi_OS_bridge_packet keeps all authority fields false
Qi_MemoryOS_record_candidate is append-only
Qi_MemoryOS_record_candidate rejects MemoryOS overwrite authority
Qi_MemoryOS_record_candidate requires FullPathQi MemoryOS surface
No v0.2 module grants execution authority
closure_statement: Physical Quantum Qi v0.2 deepening has a public contract, equation document, SK/FV action v0.2A document, Ward/leak identity v0.2B physicalization document, DPI recoverability v0.2C theoremization document, IndraNet gauge transport v0.2D geometry document, equation packet, DPI recoverability packet, IndraNet gauge transport packet, example packet, validation cases, validators, manifest, release packet, finality packet, chain index, dedicated CI workflow, all-governance CI integration, Qi OS handoff surface, Qi OS bridge runtime/tests, Qi MemoryOS record candidate runtime/tests, and Ward/leak v0.2B regression tests. This closure grants no proof, ontology, clinical, execution, commit, belief commit, belief-root commit, memory overwrite, world-root rewrite, truth, or safety override authority. Ward_leak_identity_v0_2B requires J_Qi as an action variation, D_mu J accounting, physical leak/anomaly/residue decomposition, and zero W_leak residual for PhysicalQi/FullPathQi closure. DPI_recoverability_v0_2C requires Delta_DPI, R_Qi, eta_Qi, delta_rec, and repair/rollback evaluation gating without execution authority. IndraNet_gauge_transport_v0_2D requires A_mu, F_munu, U_gamma, W(C), scope drift, holonomy residue, and component-visible transport residue while rejecting graph-only transport.
